scripts.build: npm run build -w @walkcroach/db && npm run build -w @walkcroach/agent-harness && npm run build -w @walkcroach/backend && npm run build -w @walkcroach/chrome-api && npm run build -w @walkcroach/ide-api
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @walkcroach/db && npm run build -w @walkcroach/agent-harness
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.package:lambda:chrome: npm run build -w @walkcroach/db && npm run build -w @walkcroach/agent-harness && node scripts/package-lambda-chrome.mjs
scripts.package:lambda:ide: npm run build -w @walkcroach/db && npm run build -w @walkcroach/agent-harness && node scripts/package-lambda-ide.mjs
scripts.package:lambda:all: npm run package:lambda && npm run package:lambda:chrome && npm run package:lambda:ide
